last 7 days - evening. This field indicates if the resident is awake all or most of the evening (I.e., naps no more than one hour during the evening). 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown
442 N1D N1D_NONE_ABOVE (N1D) None of Above Time Awake CHAR 1 Activity pursuit patterns: time awake over last 7 days - none of above. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown
443 N2 N2_TM_ACTIVITIES (N2) Time Involved in Activities CHAR 1 Activity pursuit patterns: average time involved in activities. 0 = Most - more than 2/3
